property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\sawan\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\sawan\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot in;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\Scripts;C:\Personal\Education\Software\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;C:\Users\sawan\.local in;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 in;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\Scripts;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code Insiders in;C:\Users\sawan\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;c:\Users\sawan\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.
